message:
feat(index): implement layer-aware skill indexing pipeline

Layer-Aware Skill Indexing
===========================

This commit enhances the indexing pipeline to automatically assign skills
to the correct layer (base/org/project/user) based on their source path.
Previously, all skills were hardcoded to the "project" layer regardless
of their actual location. Now, skills inherit their layer from the
configured skill_paths bucket they belong to.

This enables proper layer-based overrides where user skills take precedence
over project skills, which take precedence over org skills, etc.

Changes in src/cli/commands/index.rs:
- Add SkillRoot struct to pair paths with their intended layer
- Add DiscoveredSkill struct to track both path and layer during discovery
- Modify collect_index_paths() to map config buckets to layers:
  * skill_paths.global → Org layer
  * skill_paths.project → Project layer
  * skill_paths.community → Base layer
  * skill_paths.local → User layer
- Update discover_skill_files() to propagate layer from root to discovered skills
- Pass layer to index_skill_file() and through to write_skill_with_layer()
- Update progress display and robot mode output to use new structures

Changes in src/storage/sqlite.rs:
- Modify upsert_skill_pending() to accept explicit SkillLayer parameter
- Update INSERT statement to use provided layer instead of hardcoded "project"
- This enables skills to be stored with their correct source_layer value

Changes in src/storage/tx.rs:
- Add write_skill_with_layer() method for explicit layer specification
- Modify write_skill() to call write_skill_with_layer() with Project as default
- Add SkillLayer import from core module
- Update db_write_pending() to accept and forward layer parameter
- Update batch write methods to use layer-aware path

The layer information flows: config → index → discover → tx → sqlite,
ensuring skills are correctly tagged for layer-based resolution at runtime.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -687,19 +687,24 @@ impl Database {
     ///
     /// The source_path and content_hash are only finalized by `finalize_skill_commit`
     /// after Git commit succeeds.
-    pub fn upsert_skill_pending(&self, skill: &crate::core::SkillSpec) -> Result<()> {
+    pub fn upsert_skill_pending(
+        &self,
+        skill: &crate::core::SkillSpec,
+        layer: crate::core::SkillLayer,
+    ) -> Result<()> {
         self.conn.execute(
             "INSERT INTO skills
              (id, name, description, version, author, source_path, source_layer,
               content_hash, body, metadata_json, assets_json, token_count, quality_score,
               indexed_at, modified_at)
-             VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, 'pending', 'project', 'pending', '', ?, '{}', 0, 0.0,
+             VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, 'pending', ?, 'pending', '', ?, '{}', 0, 0.0,
                      datetime('now'), datetime('now'))
              ON CONFLICT(id) DO UPDATE SET
                 name=excluded.name,
                 description=excluded.description,
                 version=excluded.version,
                 author=excluded.author,
+                source_layer=excluded.source_layer,
                 metadata_json=excluded.metadata_json,
                 modified_at=excluded.modified_at",
             params![
@@ -708,6 +713,7 @@ impl Database {
                 skill.metadata.description,
                 skill.metadata.version,
                 skill.metadata.author,
+                layer.as_str(),
                 serde_json::to_string(&skill.metadata).unwrap_or_default(),
             ],
         )?;
